content:
🌟 sistine | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling touchscreen functionality on a MacBook without dedicated hardware.
✨ Key Features: • Turns MacBook into a touchscreen • Uses $1 of hardware • Utilizes computer vision • Leverages built-in webcam • Translates video feed into touch events
📖 Summary: Project Sistine transforms a MacBook into a functional touchscreen using minimal hardware and computer vision. It leverages the MacBook's built-in webcam and a small mirror to detect finger proximity and touches on the screen, translating them into input events.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
